changes.description: Replaced auth-only UserFromContext check with userHouseholdIDs() + membership loop in SpendingByCategory, MonthlyTrend, and DashboardSummary resolvers. Removed unused middleware import.
Replaced auth-only UserFromContext check with userHouseholdIDs() + membership loop in PreviewCSVImport resolver. CommitCSVImport unchanged (already had correct ent-based membership check).
